message:
test(ci): regenerate all certification and gate report timestamps

Re-run of the full CI certification pipeline on 2026-03-22, updating
generated_at / ts / run_id / correlation_id timestamps across all 16
test report artifacts. No gate verdicts, statuses, or structural data
changed -- this is a pure timestamp refresh.

Affected report suites (all timestamp-only):

  cross_platform_reports/linux (3 files):
    - platform_events.jsonl: 10 check events, all still "pass"
    - platform_report.json: generated_at 03:10:43 -> 04:01:44 UTC
    - platform_report.md: same timestamp update in header

  ext_conformance/reports (2 files):
    - CONFORMANCE_REPORT.md: generated_at 01:24:07 -> 04:01:46 UTC
    - conformance_summary.json: updated generated_at, run_id, and
      correlation_id; counts unchanged (0 fail, 224 na, 10 pass)

  full_suite_gate (11 files):
    - certification_verdict.json: generated_at 03:10:44 -> 04:01:44 UTC;
      verdict still "fail" (ext_must_pass, conformance_regression,
      conformance_pass_rate blocking failures unchanged)
    - certification_events.jsonl: 20 gate events, all timestamps updated;
      same pass/fail/skip distribution preserved
    - certification_report.md: header timestamp updated
    - full_suite_verdict.json: generated_at updated; verdict still "fail"
    - full_suite_events.jsonl: 20 gate events, timestamps only
    - full_suite_report.md: header timestamp updated
    - preflight_verdict.json: generated_at updated; verdict still "fail"
    - artifact_retention_report.json: generated_at updated
    - perf3x_bead_coverage_audit.json: generated_at updated; status "pass"
    - practical_finish_checkpoint.json: generated_at updated; status "pass"
    - waiver_audit.json: generated_at updated; 0 total waivers unchanged

66 insertions, 66 deletions across 16 files -- zero semantic changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
